title: support connect remote server over a proxy
body:
/kind feature

**Description**

i have a remote podman server in production environment，with a network ACL limit, i have to use a proxy(socks5 or ssh jump server) to visit my service.
but i didn't find a way to set proxy, please give a help, thx!

comments.body:
@shuaiyy Currently we do not provide a transparent way to do what you ask. 

As a work around that might work, run ssh port forward (-L) between local host and bastion host which runs another ssh command on the bastion to forward (-L) the same port to the production environment anchored to port/socket. Then configure your podman client to connect to the local socket.

@shuaiyy How about adding `bindings.ConnectionWithClient(ctx context.Context, client *http.Client) (context.Context, error)`? It would not break encapsulation or any current users. It also makes it explicit you are changing clients.

```go
// Build custom http.client...
client := MyHttpClient()
conn, _ := bindings.NewConnection(...)
conn, _ := conn.ConnectionWithClient(conn, client)
```
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Reopen if this is not fixed.
